last_substantive_baseline.title: chore: reconcile merged publication project state
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This baseline reconciles repository-native project state to the merged publication workflow. It does not prove workflow dispatch, current pricing, effective role-assignment write permission, deployment, managed-identity publication, Blob response, browser rendering, or a committed live frontend source.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #43 merge commit observed before opening planner-repin PR #44
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is a time-bounded observation. Resolve the live main head, PR state, reviews, CI, workflow runs, and Azure reality whenever this file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: This ChatGPT conversation — bounded planner-repin pull request explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar with 'Proceed'
authored_change.scope: Repin the merged publication execution workflow, regression test, and runbook to successful read-only planner run 29979955391, evaluated commit c3a17f8765fc7b9e43ef5f92a490ee43246ef35e, and artifact digest cb2b3ec7f9563d376e0ac4bae4e089af03a506ee272573445bf6510b946712bc. Reconcile project state without changing Bicep, executor behavior, Azure permissions, Azure resources, runtime systems, or frontend source.
verification_criteria: workflow defaults and exact fail-closed comparisons pin planner run 29979955391
regression tests require the current planner evidence and reject the superseded run and digest
runbook dispatch inputs and confirmation phrase use planner run 29979955391
Bicep, executor, rollback, public-access, CORS, collector, network, and frontend files remain unchanged
project validation, all unit tests, and Bicep lint/build pass on the exact PR head
the final PR diff remains limited to the five declared paths
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep PR #44 draft, inspect the exact validation or review finding, patch only the five declared paths, and do not dispatch workflows, authenticate to Azure, grant permissions, or mutate resources.
authored_change.rollback: Close PR #44 without merge or revert its repository-only commits. No Azure, workflow-run, runtime, RBAC, Storage, or frontend rollback applies because this increment performs no external mutation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction after the read-only Azure planning boundary was stated
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant authorizes Azure reads and ProviderNoRbac planning only. It does not authorize the merged publication execution workflow, deployment, RBAC changes, report publication, endpoint configuration, guest commands, or any Azure mutation.

completed_increments.title: Decouple live report publication from collector compute
Repair read-only planner RBAC evidence capture
Use ProviderNoRbac for read-only ARM planning
Use Blob endpoint for browser report CORS
chore: reconcile merged publication project state

proven: exact reviewed commit checkout and bounded authority validation succeeded
Azure OIDC login and current resource-group and collector inventory succeeded
no tagged report Storage account or visible collector publication role existed
What-If contained 21 Ignore and exactly four Create changes
the creates were one Storage account, one Blob service, one $web Blob-only container, and one Storage-scoped collector role assignment
zero Modify, Delete, and Replace changes were present
GitHub artifact digest and all 13 internal evidence-file hashes verified
no Azure mutation was authorized or performed
unproven: current Storage pricing, quota, and policy allowance
current collector identity and publisher availability at execution time
browser rendering and committed live frontend source

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This planner evidence is current for the merged execution-workflow commit c3a17f8765fc7b9e43ef5f92a490ee43246ef35e and unchanged Bicep through main commit 2d5ad327e45d430105f72eaaf678fe7331464db4. Re-resolve Azure state, cost, quota, permissions, collector identity, publisher availability, and exact Provider What-If immediately before any separately authorized deployment.

pr41_publication_execution_promotion.claim_boundary: Repository promotion is merged. No publication workflow execution, Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, managed-identity publication, Blob/browser proof, or manual repair is established.

pr44_publication_planner_repin.claim_boundary: Planner evidence pin only. Merge, workflow dispatch, Azure authentication, permissions, and Azure mutation remain separately unauthorized.

authority_defaults.rule: Defaults remain fail-closed. The merged execution workflow is repository state, not authority; only the separate bounded read-only planning grant is an Azure-authentication exception.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live PR head, draft state, mergeability, reviews, threads, and exact-head CI.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations and historical artifacts are insufficient.
